event.name: EuroLeague Semifinal 2026 — Real Madrid vs Fenerbahçe

context.pre_match_notes: EuroLeague Final Four at neutral site. Real Madrid 5× EuroLeague champions — institutional experience signal active. Fenerbahçe finalist experience but fewer titles. question: At a neutral Final Four site, does institutional EuroLeague experience predict direction?
